channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-17588] sanity-quota test_3a: Grace timeout was not set or quota not exceeded
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Sergey Cheremencev <scherementsev@ddn.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/c08da2f7-4140-44fd-a0c0-83448f7320f6

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4490 - 4.18.0-513.9.1.el8_9.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4490 - 4.18.0-513.9.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

Disk quotas for usr quota_usr (uid 60000):
     Filesystem  kbytes   quota   limit   grace   files   quota   limit   grace
    /mnt/lustre       0    4096       0       -       0       0       0       -
lustre-MDT0000_UUID
                      0       -       0       -       0       -       0       -
lustre-MDT0001_UUID
                      0       -       0       -       0       -       0       -
lustre-MDT0002_UUID
                      0       -       0       -       0       -       0       -
lustre-MDT0003_UUID
                      0       -       0       -       0       -       0       -
lustre-OST0000_UUID
                      0       -       0       -       -       -       -       -
lustre-OST0001_UUID
                      0       -       0       -       -       -       -       -
lustre-OST0002_UUID
                      0       -       0       -       -       -       -       -
lustre-OST0003_UUID
                      0       -       0       -       -       -       -       -
lustre-OST0004_UUID
                      0       -    1024       -       -       -       -       -
lustre-OST0005_UUID
                      0       -       0       -       -       -       -       -
lustre-OST0006_UUID
                      0       -       0       -       -       -       -       -
lustre-OST0007_UUID
                      0       -       0       -       -       -       -       -
...
running as uid/gid/euid/egid 60000/60000/60000/60000, groups:
 [dd] [if=/dev/zero] [of=/mnt/lustre/d3a.sanity-quota/f3a.sanity-quota-0] [bs=1K] [count=10] [seek=5120]
10+0 records in
10+0 records out
10240 bytes (10 kB, 10 KiB) copied, 0.00169673 s, 6.0 MB/s
Grace time is -
Sleep through grace ...
 sanity-quota test_3a: @@@@@@ FAIL: Grace timeout was not set or quota not exceeded 
  Trace dump:
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6947:error()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity-quota.sh:398:wait_grace_time()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity-quota.sh:1468:test_block_soft()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity-quota.sh:1543:test_3a()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7287:run_one()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7343:run_one_logged()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7173:run_test()
item.summary: sanity-quota test_3a: Grace timeout was not set or quota not exceeded

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/54208/
Subject: LU-17588 tests: test_block_soft: set max_diry_mb=1
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 6cb731fbb095206e37295b9c2e5fcd6ead3b0bf1

"Sergey Cheremencev <scherementsev@ddn.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/54208
Subject: LU-17588 tests: test_block_soft: set max_diry_mb=1
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: f6854e13b945b27113da6673a96c13ab8eaf8025

Due to my investigation of sanity-quota_3a debug logs from https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/9cda2950-3b7c-4dbe-aa94-f90e330bfc95 there were no any BRW activity on OST0000. I guess it is because the written data didn't reach the limit of max_dirty_mb.
